title: Graustark
writer: Marian Ainslee, Lenore J. Coffee, Frances Marion
actors: Norma Talmadge, Eugene O'Brien, Marc McDermott
plot: While traveling by train from Denver to Washington, DC, wealthy young Grenfall Lorry meets a beautiful young girl. When they are accidentally left behind in a mining town, they race through the mountains and finally catch it. They...
